description_long: This is a large, multi-section wooden cabinet unit with a rich brown finish, designed for storage and display. The front features a symmetrical arrangement of compartments, including two glass-paneled display cabinets on either side, several closed cupboards above, and drawers and cabinets below. The central section has an open shelf and a pull-down compartment, likely for media or decorative items. The cabinet is constructed with flat panels, straight edges, and subtle molding details, giving it a classic, functional appearance. Metal handles are visible on the drawers and doors, and the glass panels add a touch of elegance. The overall structure is robust and intended for placement against a wall in a living room, office, or similar urban interior.
description: A large, brown wooden cabinet with glass-paneled display sections, multiple drawers, cupboards, and metal handles, designed for storage and display in urban interiors.
description_view_0: The back of the cabinet, showing a flat, featureless brown panel with vertical and horizontal divisions.
description_view_1: A side view revealing the cabinet's depth, flat side panel, and the protruding central section.
description_view_2: The front of the cabinet, displaying glass-paneled doors, drawers, cupboards, and open shelving with visible handles.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and the stepped profile of the front compartments.
